# G1 Pass Fixture

## Reference Class

Historical projects with similar scope and plan-vs-actual ratios:

| Project | Scope | Actual Duration | Plan-vs-Actual |
|---------|-------|-----------------|----------------|
| ERP Migration 2019 | Large | 18 months | 1.8x |
| API Rewrite 2021 | Medium | 6 months | 1.3x |

Both projects ran over plan due to scope creep and integration issues.
Outside-view estimate: apply 1.5x multiplier to current plan estimate.
